🎉 Create a Board
📋Data Reports

Transform Recognition Activity Into Actionable Insights

Give HR leaders, managers, and executives structured, exportable reports on recognition programs, participation, and culture initiative performance.

Access ReportsHow It Works
WorkKudo — Data Reports
📋
Executive SummaryProgram performance overview
📊
Participation ReportEngagement breakdown by team
📤
Export ReadyPDF and CSV formats available
📊 HR Reports
📋 Exports
👔 Leadership

Organizations Need Meaningful Reporting to Evaluate Culture Initiatives

Without structured data, HR teams struggle to evaluate program effectiveness, justify recognition investments to leadership, or make informed decisions about culture strategy.

Data Reports give every stakeholder — from HR administrators to C-level executives — clear, organized visibility into how recognition is performing across the organization.

1No structured way to evaluate recognition program ROI
2Leadership asks for culture data but HR lacks the tools to provide it
3Manual data collection is time-consuming and error-prone
4Reports need to be tailored for different audiences and purposes
📋
Structured ReportsOrganized, ready-to-share data
📤
One-Click ExportPDF and CSV downloads
👔
Leadership-ReadyFormatted for executive reviews

Reports Built for Every Stakeholder

Data Reports give HR teams, managers, and leadership the context they need — in the format that works for them.

📋

Executive Summaries

High-level program performance overviews formatted for leadership reviews and board presentations.

📊

Participation Reports

Detailed breakdowns of who participated, which teams engaged, and how contributions were distributed.

🎯

Program Performance

Evaluate individual recognition campaigns and culture initiatives against participation and delivery goals.

📤

One-Click Exports

Download any report as a PDF or CSV with a single click — ready for presentations, planning, and archiving.

📅

Scheduled Reporting

Set up recurring reports delivered to HR inboxes automatically — weekly, monthly, or quarterly.

🔒

Role-Based Access

Control who sees what. HR admins get full reports; managers see team-relevant summaries.

How It Works

01
🚀

Run Your Programs

Create and deliver recognition boards, campaigns, and culture initiatives across the organization.

02
📊

Data Is Collected

WorkKudo automatically captures participation, delivery, and engagement data across all programs.

03
📋

Reports Are Generated

Structured reports are compiled and made available for HR, managers, and leadership.

04
📤

Export & Share

Download reports in PDF or CSV format and share with stakeholders for reviews and planning.

🚀

Run Your Programs

Create and deliver recognition boards, campaigns, and culture initiatives across the organization.

Use Cases

See how organizations put Data Reports to work.

👔

Leadership Reviews

Present program performance and culture health data to senior leadership in structured, credible reports.

📋

HR Reporting

Support quarterly HR reviews with detailed participation and engagement data across the organization.

🎯

Recognition Programs

Evaluate the performance of specific recognition campaigns to understand what resonates and what doesn't.

👔

Leadership Reviews

Present program performance and culture health data to senior leadership in structured, credible reports.

🎯

Recognition Programs

Evaluate the performance of specific recognition campaigns to understand what resonates and what doesn't.

📊

Engagement Analysis

Use report data to understand engagement patterns and make targeted culture improvements.

🌱

Culture Reporting

Build a culture reporting cadence with structured data that supports continuous improvement.

🔍

Program Audits

Review historical program data to identify long-term trends in recognition and participation.

HR AdminManager ViewExecutive Summary

Why It Matters

🧠

Better Decisions

Give HR leaders the structured data they need to make informed culture and program decisions.

👔

Leadership Visibility

Provide executives with clear, credible reports on recognition program performance and culture health.

🎯

Program Evaluation

Objectively evaluate which recognition initiatives are working and which need adjustment.

📈

Continuous Improvement

Use report data to iteratively improve programs, timing, and participation across the organization.

⚡

Time Savings

Automated report generation eliminates manual data collection and hours spent on presentation prep.

🔒

Data Security

Role-based access ensures sensitive organizational data is only visible to the appropriate stakeholders.
